heading: Available Search Tiers
body:

| S60           | Default RAM: 64 GBDefault Storage: 1200 GiBvCPU: 32  |
| S70           | Default RAM: 96 GBDefault Storage: 1800 GiBvCPU: 48  |
| S80           | Default RAM: 128 GBDefault Storage: 2400 GiBvCPU: 64 |
